name: Tom Yum (Hot & Sour Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh mushrooms (or other ingredient) cut into convenient spoonable size pieces
2-3 tablespoons sliced bamboo shoots or coconut shoots
recipeInstructions:
1. Bruise the fresh chiles in a mortar and pestle.
2. Heat the dried chilies first, then crumble into the fresh chilies.
3. Grind the lemon grass with the mortar and pestle or the back of a cleaver.
4. Bring about 3 cups of water to boiling point.
5. Add all ingredients to the boiling water and stir constantly until cooked (mushrooms cook quickly, longer for chicken or shrimp, longest for beef).
